message:
fix(storage,runtime,policy,session): comprehensive bug fixes for all noted issues

storage.rs:
- FTS rebuild: save/restore pane progress on hard failure, log at ERROR
  level when pane re-indexing fails, document non-atomic risk
- Writer batch: document crash-vulnerability window, add tracing::warn
  for multi-command batch sizes
- Approval tokens: add security doc warning about missing scope
  validation in consume_by_code, add audit logging

runtime_compat.rs:
- JoinHandle::abort(): implement via Arc<AtomicBool> abort flag checked
  in poll(); returns Err(JoinError) when aborted instead of no-op
- JoinSet::abort_all(): call abort() on each handle before clearing
- spawn_detached: wrap future in HandleContextFuture to enable nested
  task::spawn() in detached tasks
- select!: add detailed SAFETY doc explaining why tokio::select works
  under asupersync and when it will break

session_restore.rs:
- Fix test case mismatch: "runtime error:" → "Runtime error:" to match
  thiserror Display impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
